headline: RBC Capital Maintains Sector Perform on Incyte, Raises Price Target to $99
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Brian Abrahams   maintains Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $95 to $99.
